meaning: circuit(以黑人演员为特色的)一组黑人戏院(或夜总会)
examples: So it took me out of the chitlin' circuit and I was thankful for that.
Ms. STATON: At that time, I was basically doing chitlin' circuit gigs.
They'd won an Apollo Theater talent night the previous year and were working the "chitlin circuit" of black clubs when producer Bobby Taylor urged Motown to sign the group.
